sql: CREATE OR ALTER VIEW PUBLIC.VW_A AS SELECT * FROM PUBLIC.T1
CREATE OR ALTER VIEW PUBLIC.VW_B AS SELECT * FROM PUBLIC.T1 JOIN PUBLIC.T2 ON T1.id = T2.id
description: view with JOIN depends on two tables

sql: CREATE OR ALTER TABLE PUBLIC.CHILD (id INT, parent_id INT REFERENCES PUBLIC.PARENT(id))
CREATE OR ALTER VIEW PUBLIC.VW_C AS SELECT * FROM PUBLIC.T1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM PUBLIC.T2)
-- @depends_on: PUBLIC.SCHEMA_A\nCREATE OR ALTER TABLE PUBLIC.T1 (id INT)
